svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="Building Blocksなし" id="without"> <mxGraphModel dx="1099" dy="639" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="trad-time" parent="trad-container" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=14;fontColor=#cc0000;fontStyle=1" value="<b>所要時間: 数日〜数週間</b>" vertex="1"> as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="trad-2" parent="trad-container" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffcccc;strokeColor=#cc0000;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=13;" value="<b>技術選定</b>" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="trad-4" parent="trad-container" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffcccc;strokeColor=#cc0000;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=13;" value="<b>コーディング</b>"
